trade.summary: Trade has collapsed to near zero since Russia's full-scale invasion in February 2022. Minimal humanitarian corridors only. Pre-war trade exceeded $40B annually.

diplomatic.status: Active armed conflict — no diplomatic relations
diplomatic.summary: Ucraina severed diplomatic relations following Russia's full-scale invasion in February 2022. No ambassadors exchanged. Communications routed through third parties for prisoner exchanges.
recent_incidents: Ongoing missile strikes on Ukrainian civilian infrastructure

military.summary: Active high-intensity interstate war since February 24, 2022. Russia occupies approximately 18% of Ukrainian territory. Front lines largely static since late 2023.

financial.summary: Russia's assets frozen internationally. Ucraina's financial system under severe war stress. Russian sovereign debt defaults. No bilateral financial flows.

energy.summary: Ucraina terminated remaining gas transit arrangements with Russia at end of 2024. Russian strikes have destroyed significant Ukrainian energy infrastructure.

scientific.summary: All scientific and academic cooperation suspended. Ukrainian researchers evacuated from occupied territories. Brain drain ongoing.
